author: golddream-y
description: Chat with your vault. Ask questions with cited answers, and auto-research across notes to write summaries. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.name: Ratel

name: Ratel

releases.author: golddream-y
releases.description:
## Fixes

- **解除 Obsidian plugin checker 阻塞**:修复 `no-deprecated-display` 错误,设置面板全量迁移到 `getSettingDefinitions()` 声明式 API(Obsidian 1.13.0+)
- 删除 deprecated `display()` 方法,改用声明式 group / action / render / page item
- 嵌套 key(`toolPermissions.xxx` / `promptOverrides.xxx`)通过 override `getControlValue` / `setControlValue` 处理

## Notes

- 用户可见行为零变化,同样的设置项与交互
- 诊断 Tab 改用 `SettingPage` 子页面命令式渲染(官方推荐的 imperative 兜底)
- 本地 `npm run lint` 可复现并验证 plugin checker 规则集

releases.author: golddream-y
releases.description:
## Ratel Vault 0.1.1

Obsidian plugin checker 合规修复版本。

### Fixes
- 修复 `path-safety.ts` 中 `.obsidian` 硬编码警告,改为运行时从 `app.vault.configDir` 注入
- 实现 `getSettingDefinitions()` 满足 Obsidian 1.13.0 设置面板契约
- `folder-watcher.ts` `globalThis` → `window` 兼容 popout 窗口
- `ratel-secrets.ts` 修复 SecretStorage 调用导致 `this` 丢失
- `llm-deepseek.ts` 移除未使用的 `_err` 绑定

### Requirements
- Obsidian 1.13.0+ (desktop only)
- LLM API key (DeepSeek/Claude) — Ollama works without key

### Known limitations
- Large vault first-scan indexing is slower
- Claude adapter does not expose thinking blocks

### Installation
See [User Guide](https://github.com/golddream-y/obsidian-ratel/blob/main/docs/user-guide.md) for setup.
